## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO strategy for Q2 priority accounts and align on content approach for different industry verticals.](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO focus on two buckets: retail-related keywords and footwear-specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Need for a holistic, strategic approach to content creation across multiple industries and stakeholder roles](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Recent implementation of global schema on website, but requires refinement for page-specific relevance](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Plan to develop a comprehensive SEO strategy, considering industry pain points and ICP-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

## Topics

### SEO Content Buckets

  - [Two main buckets identified: retail-related keywords and footwear-specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Retail keywords not directly targeting Firework, but relevant to overall retail industry](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Footwear keywords focused on footwear-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Connected commerce keywords suggested for incorporation into SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)

### Target Industries and Regions

  - [US-focused categories: grocery, beauty D2C, beauty retailer, grocery retailer, CPG brands, home improvement retailer, home improvement brand](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [EMEA focus (Europe, Middle East, Africa) with emphasis on EU, UK, France, Germany, Sweden](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Plan to localize site for EMEA region, potentially launching French and Spanish domains](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Strategic Approach to Content Creation

  - [Need for a more holistic approach with clear steps (e.g., publish 200 articles in 4 weeks, create lead magnets)](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Importance of understanding industry-specific pain points (e.g., tariffs affecting sourcing and margins for fashion retailers)](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Focus on creating content addressing conversion rate improvement and sales growth](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Targeting multiple stakeholders within enterprise brands (e.g., digital product, merchandising, paid media, marketing technology, design, IT)](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### Website Schema Implementation

  - [Comprehensive global schema added to every page on the site](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [New features: rating section, related-to section, social links, 50 FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Potential issues with global FAQ schema implementation; need for page-specific schema instead](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Expected improvements in SEO scores, rich search results, and overall site credibility](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Need for better storytelling and analysis of why specific topics are selected](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Importance of aligning content with ICPs and addressing specific pain points for each industry](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Plan to develop a strategic game plan for the next four weeks](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to research and prepare a strategy for footwear industry, considering pain points and ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Set up a meeting on Wednesday to discuss SEO strategy for Q2 priority accounts](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Cameron to reconvene with E regarding page-specific schema implementation](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Explore possibility of rescheduling future meetings to accommodate E's participation (potentially 1 hour later)](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [Ritesh to align with Abhishek on overall SEO strategy and approach](https://fathom.video/share/s7sUwE6Vi3cRW_GfBxAPA3a2-3YqRQya?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
